de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class TacletSchemaVariableCollector

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.DefaultVisitor
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.TacletSchemaVariableCollector
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    TacletVariableSVCollector

    public class TacletSchemaVariableCollector
extends DefaultVisitor
    Collects all schemavariables occurring in the \find, \assumes part or goal description of a taclet. The addrule section is scanned optionally. Duplicates are not removed because the use of persistent datastructure and up to now we just have a SetAsList-implementaion causing to have O(sqr(n)) if it would used. For example, TacletApp uses this class to determine all uninstantiated schemavariables.

      the instantiations needed for unwind loop constructs
      protected ImmutableList<SchemaVariable> varList
      collects all found variables

    • Constructor Detail

      • TacletSchemaVariableCollector

        public TacletSchemaVariableCollector()

      • TacletSchemaVariableCollector

        public TacletSchemaVariableCollector(SVInstantiations svInsts)
        Parameters:
        svInsts - the SVInstantiations that have been already found (needed by unwind loop constructs to determine which labels are needed)

    • Method Detail

      • collectSVInProgram

        protected ImmutableList<SchemaVariable> collectSVInProgram(JavaBlock jb,
                                                           ImmutableList<SchemaVariable> vars)
        collects all SchemVariables that occur in the JavaBlock
        Parameters:
        jb - the JavaBlock where to look for Schemavariables
        vars - the IList where to add the found SchemaVariables
        Returns:
        the extended list of found schemavariables

      • visit

        public void visit(Term t)
        visits the Term in post order Term.execPostOrder(Visitor) and collects all found schema variables
        Parameters:
        t - the Term whose schema variables are collected

      • collectSVInElementaryUpdate

        private ImmutableList<SchemaVariable> collectSVInElementaryUpdate(ElementaryUpdate op,
                                                                  ImmutableList<SchemaVariable> vars)
        collects all schema variables occurring on the lhs of an elementary update
        Parameters:
        op - the ElementaryUpdate operator to be scanned for schemavariables
        vars - the ImmutableList with already found schema variables
        Returns:
        a list of schema variables containing the ones of vars together with the schema variables found in op

      • vars

        public Iterable<SchemaVariable> vars()
        Returns:
        list of found Variables

        public Iterator<SchemaVariable> varIterator()
        Returns:
        iterator of the found Variables

      • size

        public int size()
        Returns:
        number of the found variables

        public boolean contains(SchemaVariable var)
        Returns:

      • visit

        public void visit(Sequent seq)

      • visit

        public void visit(Taclet taclet,
                  boolean visitAddrules)
        collects all schema variables of a taclet
        Parameters:
        taclet - the Taclet where the variables have to be collected to
        visitAddrules - a boolean that contols if the addrule sections are to be ignored (iff false) or if the visitor descends into them (iff true)
